name: welcome-to-grass-valley-processor
description: Linux desktop processor for Welcome to Grass Valley podcast episodes.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "wait-on tcp:5173 && npm run build:electron && ELECTRON_START_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build:electron && vite build
